name: CacheClient set/get respects TTL expiry
description: Functional test: verify CacheClient.set and CacheClient.get behavior including TTL expiration logic implemented by _now, set, and get.
input: Instantiate CacheClient(), call set('k','v', ttl=1), immediately get('k'), sleep 1.5s, then get('k') again
output: Initial get returns stored value, subsequent get after TTL returns None
success_criteria: Initial cache.get('k') returns the stored value 'v'
After sleeping past TTL, cache.get('k') returns None
No exceptions are raised during set/get operations
error_scenarios: Time-related flakiness if system sleeps are unreliable
